title: Stone Utils
description: Adds utilities for living in the stone age. Specifically, stone shears, stone chests, stone crafting tables, and ceramic (clay) shears.
body:
Adds utilities for living in the stone age. Specifically, stone shears, stone chests, stone crafting tables, and ceramic (clay) shears. ## This mod depends on [WSMLMB](https://modrinth.com/mod/wsmlmb)! ### This is a fabric mod, don't ask about porting to (neo)forge! The shears are fully functional: you can break grass, mine wool fast, take seeds out of pumpkins, shear sheep and snow golems, collect honeycomb from beehives, etc.
Stone shears only have 93 durability, while ceramic shears have 121 durability.
**Credit goes to [cech12](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/thecech12/projects) for making the textures for everything having to do with the ceramic shears, which were used in their [Ceramic Shears](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ceramic-shears) mod.** The chest and crafting tables also work the same as their wooden counterparts. This mod also adds two crafting materials, which are used to craft the stone crafting table and chest. Please report any bugs you find on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/AnAwesomGuy/stone-shears/issues) on GitHub. This mod also requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) but you should probably already have that installed.
